no: Author advice it's safe to skip the Gate component if installing SCS technically they should go later with other tweaks, but ToF seems to check on files changed by these Other mods won't affect them so this may be a good place to group them v Olvyn Tweaks - Clerics and Monks only require 160k xp to reach lv9 If installing any of the cleric options, it should go before ToF's Druid xp tables using Cleric's
ic: EET - [Make it possible to enter the Nashkel Mines through the back cave entrance & Make it possible to enter the catacombs beneath Candlekeep early]

conflicts.reason: These components modify BG1 areas in ways incompatible with EET's area handling.
conflicts.myComps: #2800 Nashkel Mines back entrance #3000 Candlekeep catacombs early

conflicts.reason: METweaks' shamanic dance tweak is redundant with A7's Improved Shamanic Dance

conflicts.reason: Olvyn cn:980 has FORBID_COMPONENT for METweaks cn:900 — same ranger/paladin progression. If METweaks cn:900 installed first, Olvyn cn:980 auto-skips. Choose one. Other METweaks components (cn:1000/1600) have no Olvyn overlap.

conflicts.theirComps: #980 Ranger/Paladin spell progression (Olvyn cn:980 FORBID METweaks cn:900)

#10 Charisma on prices #11 Reputation on prices

spells: Rangers and Paladins cast spells at full caster level

sum: Tweak mod for Infinity Engine games, particularly the Enhanced Editions

co.n: Make quest experience divided among party members
co.tp2n: Make quest experience divided among party members
co.no: Quest XP divided among party members instead of each getting full amount.

co.n: Remove the limit of two proficiency points in a weapon at character creation
co.tp2n: Remove the limit of two proficiency points in a weapon at character creation
co.no: Use this or EET Tweaks'. MULTICAT to RESTORATIONS — must install BEFORE FnP/ToF/MiH EQ to avoid WeiDU cascade reinstall of all kit mods (profsmax.2da conflict). Installing after FnP adds ~20 min cascade + crash risk.

co.n: Proficiency Rate: Fighters 1/2 lvl, Rangers/Paladins 1/3 lvl
co.tp2n: Fighters get 1 point per 2 levels; Rangers and Paladins still get 1 point per 3 levels
co.no: Incompatible with ToF's revised proficiency system
co.scn: Increase the rate at which warriors get proficiency points

co.n: Proficiency Rate: All warriors 1/2 lvl
co.tp2n: Fighters, Rangers and Paladins get 1 point per 2 levels
co.scn: Increase the rate at which warriors get proficiency points
co.no: Proficiency rate: all warriors gain 1 pip per 2 levels.

co.n: Proficiency Rate: Fighters 1/lvl, Rangers/Paladins 1/2 lvl
co.tp2n: Fighters get 1 point per level; Rangers and Paladins get 1 point per 2 levels
co.scn: Increase the rate at which warriors get proficiency points

co.n: Allow Shamans to move while dancing
co.tp2n: Allow Shamans to move while dancing
co.no: Redundant with A7's Improved Shamanic Dance

co.n: Clerics/Monks Need 160K XP for Level 9: Clerics only
co.tp2n: Clerics only
co.scn: Make it so that clerics and/or monks require only 160000 experience to get to level 9

co.n: Clerics/Monks Need 160K XP for Level 9: Monks only
co.tp2n: Monks only
co.scn: Make it so that clerics and/or monks require only 160000 experience to get to level 9

co.n: Clerics/Monks Need 160K XP for Level 9: Both Clerics and Monks
co.tp2n: Both Clerics and Monks
co.scn: Make it so that clerics and/or monks require only 160000 experience to get to level 9

co.n: Let Rangers and Paladins cast spells at their full caster level
co.tp2n: Let Rangers and Paladins cast spells at their full caster level
co.no: Rangers and paladins cast divine spells at their full class level instead of reduced.

co.n: Give Monks a cooler Deflect Missiles ability
co.tp2n: Give Monks a cooler Deflect Missiles ability
co.no: Monks gain a Deflect Missiles ability that blocks ranged attacks.

co.n: Give Rangers the Tracking ability (from Throne of Bhaal) starting at level 1
co.tp2n: Give Rangers the Tracking ability (from Throne of Bhaal) starting at level 1
co.no: Rangers get the Tracking ability starting at level 1 instead of only in ToB.

co.n: Power Up Ranger Charm Animal
co.tp2n: Power Up Ranger Charm Animal
co.no: Powers up the Ranger Charm Animal ability with longer duration and wider creature range.

co.n: Turn Paladin Detect Evil into a passive ability that can be toggled on and off
co.tp2n: Turn Paladin Detect Evil into a passive ability that can be toggled on and off
co.no: Converts Paladin Detect Evil into a passive toggleable aura ability.

co.n: Increase Wizard Slayer Magic Resistance
co.tp2n: Increase Wizard Slayer Magic Resistance
co.no: Increases Wizard Slayer magic resistance gain per level.

co.n: Make Assassin backstab multiplier improve faster
co.tp2n: Make Assassin backstab multiplier improve faster
co.no: Assassin backstab multiplier increases at lower levels for faster progression.

co.n: Allow cursed scrolls to be used on enemies
co.tp2n: Allow cursed scrolls to be used on enemies
co.no: Cursed scrolls can be targeted at enemies instead of only affecting the reader.

co.n: Make creatures take up less space
co.tp2n: Make creatures take up less space
co.no: Reduces creature collision circles so they take up less space in combat.

co.n: Make enemies change their attack targets more quickly
co.tp2n: Make enemies change their attack targets more quickly
co.no: Enemies switch attack targets more quickly when better opportunities appear.

co.n: No Party Required area transitions
co.tp2n: No Party Required area transitions
co.no: Allows area transitions without requiring the full party to be gathered.

co.n: Make it possible to enter the Nashkel Mines through the back cave entrance
co.tp2n: Make it possible to enter the Nashkel Mines through the back cave entrance
co.no: Incompatible with EET area handling. Caution: allows sequence-breaking

co.n: Make it possible to enter the catacombs beneath Candlekeep early
co.tp2n: Make it possible to enter the catacombs beneath Candlekeep early
co.no: Allows early entry into the Candlekeep catacombs.

co.n: Make it so the Jacil and Wiven encounters aren't replaced by other quests
co.tp2n: Make it so the Jacil and Wiven encounters aren't replaced by other quests
co.no: Possible bug: may only apply to prologue Candlekeep, not the later version. See issue #2 on GitHub

co.n: Give Belhifet more reasonable immunities
co.tp2n: Give Belhifet more reasonable immunities
co.no: Gives Belhifet more reasonable immunities instead of near-total immunity.

co.n: Infravision: THAC0 penalty in darkness
co.tp2n: Creatures without infravision have -4 THAC0 at night or in dark places
co.no: Infravision: characters without infravision suffer THAC0 penalty in darkness.

co.n: Infravision: Reduced visual range in darkness
co.tp2n: Creatures without infravision have reduced visual range at night or in dark places
co.no: Infravision: characters without infravision have reduced visual range in darkness.

co.n: Infravision: Both THAC0 penalty and reduced range
co.tp2n: Both 1 and 2
co.no: Infravision: both THAC0 penalty and reduced visual range in darkness.

co.n: Movement Speed: Double
co.tp2n: Double the movement rate
co.scn: Increase the speed of all creatures in the game (including party members)

co.n: Movement Speed: Triple
co.tp2n: Triple the movement rate
co.scn: Increase the speed of all creatures in the game (including party members)

co.n: Movement Speed: Quadruple
co.tp2n: Quadruple the movement rate
co.scn: Increase the speed of all creatures in the game (including party members)

co.n: Movement Speed: Maximum
co.tp2n: Set the movement rate to the maximum
co.scn: Increase the speed of all creatures in the game (including party members)

co.n: Implement a different kind of chunked death animation
co.tp2n: Implement a different kind of chunked death animation
co.no: Replaces the chunked death animation with a different visual effect.

co.n: Sneak Attack: Remove delay
co.tp2n: Remove the delay before a creature can be sneak-attacked again
co.scn: Modify Sneak Attack and Crippling Strike
co.no: Sneak Attack: removes the delay between backstab and next attack.

co.n: Sneak Attack: Reduce delay to 1 round
co.tp2n: Reduce the delay before a creature can be sneak-attacked again to 1 round
co.scn: Modify Sneak Attack and Crippling Strike

co.n: Sneak Attack: Remove delay, no stacking Crippling Strike
co.tp2n: Remove the delay, but prevent multiple Crippling Strikes from stacking
co.scn: Modify Sneak Attack and Crippling Strike
co.no: Sneak Attack: no delay, Crippling Strike does not stack.

co.n: Sneak Attack: 1 round delay, no stacking Crippling Strike
co.tp2n: Reduce the delay to 1 round, but prevent multiple Crippling Strikes from stacking
co.scn: Modify Sneak Attack and Crippling Strike
co.no: Sneak Attack: 1 round delay, Crippling Strike does not stack.

co.n: Modify Fighting Styles
co.tp2n: Modify Fighting Styles
co.no: Similar to HouseTweaks: styles go to 5 points with bigger bonuses. Overlaps with HT and ToF fighting styles

co.n: Replace the "I'm on it like ugly on an orc" quote with "I'm on it"
co.tp2n: Replace the "I'm on it like ugly on an orc" quote with "I'm on it"

advisories.reason: METweaks warrior proficiency rate changes may overlap with Tweaks Anthology proficiency tweaks.
Both mods offer creature movement speed changes. Pick one.
